series_metadata.series_description: DODD Security Affidavits forms, which identify a particular DODD systems user and the level of access that user and/or entity has to each of the application systems. Required for each DODD employee and any external entity accessing DODD applications and is renewed either annually or according to the renewal schedule in ITS Policy ITS-001.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: scanned and saved electronically or pursuant following: DODD Employees: one year end of employment. Provider: seven years end of certification with DODD. Billing entity: seven years termination of relationships with all DODD providers. County Board employees: seven years end date of employment with County Board. County Boards: seven years termination of relationship between County Board and DODD. MAIS Nurse: seven years nurse's credentials have expired in MAIS. MAIS Secretaries: seven years end of all relationships with MAIS nurses. ; Electronic: DODD Employee: one year end of employment. Provider: seven years end of certification with DODD. Billing entity: seven years termination of relationships with all DODD providers. County Board employees: seven years end date of employment with County Board. County Boards: seven years termination of relationship between County Board and DODD. MAIS Nurse: seven years nurse's credentials have expired in MAIS. MAIS Secretaries: seven years end of all relationships with MAIS nurses
